summary: Iteration 3 tested: real workflow execution engine (webhook + action), event-driven auto-triggers (contact + client scoped), PWA assets, JWT token in login/register responses, and mobile bottom tab bar. 29/29 backend tests passing (12 new + 17 regression, including brute-force lockout which was fixed since iter 2). Frontend UI: workflow creation with webhook step works, chip renders with link icon, manual run succeeded (runs_count went 0->1), mobile-tab-bar and all 4 mobile tabs (overview/clients/workflows/leads) present and navigable on 390px viewport, PWA assets (/manifest.json, /sw.js, /icon-192.png) return 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Workflow execution engine cleanly separates webhook (real httpx.post with 10s timeout) from action (no-op logged) - matches PRD contract.
fire_trigger correctly scopes on user_id for client-added trigger while contact trigger fires globally - verified via cross-user test.
BackgroundTasks used for auto-triggers means POST /api/contact and POST /api/clients return before workflow runs - correct non-blocking design.
Brute-force lockout now uses X-Forwarded-For leftmost hop (line 277 server.py) - fixes iter 2 regression, test_bruteforce_lockout now passes.
Login/register both return 'token' field in UserOut alongside setting httpOnly cookie - dual mode (browser cookie + mobile Bearer) works.
server.py at 587 lines - approaching split threshold (auth/clients/workflows/exec into separate modules).
CORS still set to '*' with allow_credentials=True in backend/.env - carryover from iter 2, browsers reject credentialed CORS with wildcard origin; works today only because frontend+API share origin.
Public /api/contact endpoint has no rate limiting - anyone can spam webhook runs via active workflows with 'New contact form submission' trigger; consider adding per-IP throttle.
execute_workflow catches all webhook exceptions individually - good; but overall run always persists to db.runs which is correct behavior.
No pagination on GET /api/runs beyond limit param (max 100) - acceptable for MVP.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (toast text capture flaked but run visibly succeeded)

test_credentials: admin@streamline.app / StreamAdmin#2026 verified working. Dynamic client accounts created via /api/auth/register during tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_ prefixed workflows/clients and delete them in-place. One 'UI TEST WH 747314' workflow was left over from Playwright run and manually cleaned via curl DELETE. Playbook workflows 'Webhook Test WF' and 'Lead Auto WF' from iter 2 still exist in admin scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 3 features fully verified. All 29 backend tests pass. New test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py covers webhook success/failure, auto-triggers (contact global, client user-scoped, paused-does-not-fire), PWA assets, and JWT bearer token. Playwright note: sonner toast disappears fast on success - either shorten wait or select via '[data-sonner-toast]' immediately; runs_count on the workflow card is a more reliable success signal. Remaining backlog from iter 2 is unchanged: CORS wildcard+credentials mismatch (minor, non-blocking) and Overview em-dash rendering (unverified this iter - main agent said it was already addressed).
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical bugs found in iteration 3 scope.
